reviews.text: If you are looking for a sign to book JMGant Photography, this is it! Jared was AMAZING!!! Our wedding was three years ago and people are still talking about our photographer. Jared’s communication was exceptional from the start and it remained strong through the whole process. He was very organized and kept our wedding running smooth. So organized that we ended up using his schedule and timeline for the day when our day of coordinator failed to keep it going smooth. He was not only our photographer but he also ended up helping with cutting the stray hairs on my head to make sure my hair was perfect, he put my husbands bow tie on him, and kept us from having multiple meltdowns. Jared was the glue to our wedding. Having him as our photographer was the best decision we made and not to mention the breath taking photos that we will cherish forever. We are forever grateful for Jared and JMGant photography!

Jared was amazing. All of our pre-wedding photos had such incredible views thanks to Jared scouting them out ahead of time. The day of the wedding Jared and team were invisible while simultaneously being in the middle of the action. We could not have asked for better pictures or prints and keepsakes.

Words cannot express our gratitude for Jared and his work. From beginning to end he was extremely professional, fun and transparent. Leading up to our wedding, Jared really took the time to get to know us, our vision for the day and things we like/don’t like – no detail was left undiscussed. All of that prep led to the most authentic, fun, beautiful and detailed photos we have ever seen. Those that attended the wedding kept saying how friendly Jared and the second shooter were, and that they were EVERYWHERE capturing so many moments.

The most common question we got after the wedding was “when do we get to see the photos?? We know they’re going to be amazing!” And boy, they sure were. We continue to receive compliments and “WOW’S” from friends and family months after the event. JMGant Photography isn’t there to take your standard staged photos (although we did check that box and take them for family etc.), he’s there to tell the story of your day from beginning to end, capturing all the in-between moments where you really see emotion and the details of the day. He started with us in the morning before our beauty team even got there, and even went to the barber shop with the guys to shoot their pampering. He was with us every moment of the day up until we snapped the final shot of us in the car leaving. We could not have imagined the day without Jared being a part of it. It was so much fun to work with him and made the day so enjoyable just having him around.

For couples getting married, I was bestowed a few pieces of advice regarding photography. One, the photographer is the only person that’s with you ALL day, so make sure you get along with them. Two, your photographs are the only things you keep from the wedding day other than your spouse, rings and dress – Invest wisely. Jared EXCEEDED at both of these. We were instantly able to connect with Jared and became friends quickly. It made such a big difference to meet in person and video-chat, that personal touch really helped develop our relationship before spending all day with him for the wedding. As far as investment and quality of photographs, you will be blown AWAY with what Jared is able to do.

We had a difficult day of weather (rain, grey, cold) and lighting (bright spots behind indoor backdrops), but he owned it and made our photos look like it was a totally different day weather-wise. Jared’s work is so unique and creative that your photos turn into art for you to share. We are constantly told “I’ve never seen that before!” and “Wow! How was your photographer able to do that?” and “I feel like I was there just looking at these photos!” My husband and I cannot recommend JMGant Photography enough. 10 out of 5 stars across the board.

Jared is phenomenal! He is so so good at what he does. He is so artistic, and needed little to no guidance to give us PERFECT pictures. He was our photographer for our wedding and engagement pics. If you're looking for the best photographer in Colorado, look no further!

If I could give Jared 10 stars I would.

I wanted this photographer the minute I saw his website and when I showed my husband (fiance at the time) he was 100% on board.  Since we moved to another state for work most of the meetings were virtual (even pre covid) so that was extremely helpful. Super professional and well organized. His emails to prepare for the big day were super helpful.
When the venue we picked canceled 7 weeks to our wedding, we found another one. We were super bummed, but Jared fixed that when he told us their were tons of areas for beautiful pictures.
On the day of Jared was amazing he was always on the move. Not only was he advising and taking pictures, but he also was reassuring and helped me when I was overwhelmed trying to put my dang lashes on. (used lashes many times, but this day it wasn't working).
We loved his creativity and his drive. You can tell he loves photography and weddings. For the sunset pictures I was eaten alive by mosquitos, but I know the pictures are going to be worth it. We got a teasers of our photos we are so happy already. I can't wait to see all of the pictures.
I will be using Jared again, I will drive or fly for him to take all my future photos.
Get a quote from Jared if you are looking for a photographer. He has the best quality and worth every penny. A keepsake that will last forever and down the road when your great great great grandkids see your wedding photos it will be worth it.

Thank you so much Jared for everything!
